title: Times-Table Trampoline
short_description: Bounce Waldo the Walrus sky-high by nailing times tables — or race Kevin the bot walrus.
description: Answer multiplication and division facts under gentle time pressure to bounce Waldo the Walrus higher and higher. Right answers go BOING, wrong answers go pfffft. Race mode adds Kevin, a rival bot walrus who is beatable but pushy — beat his altitude for a big bonus. Grade bands ramp from the 2/5/10 tables to 7/8/9/12 with division mixed in. Speed and streak bonuses feed your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap to pick an answer before the timer runs out.
